retrieved_result: Writers/Photographers Guidelines Writers/Photographers Guidelines The Boundary Waters Journal (BWJ) is a full color 106 page quarterly magazine featuring articles about wilderness recreation, nature and conservation within the Boundary Waters Canoe Area Wilderness (BWCAW), Quetico Provincial Park and Superior National Forest. SUBMI
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses writers/photographers guidelines for The Boundary Waters Journal, not about easy DIY room decoration ideas; unrelated content.
